Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 55 

DRUG_BENEFIT_TYPE 

LABEL: Part D Drug Benefit Type 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the type of Part D benefit structure used by the plan benefit package (Defined Standard, 
Actuarially Equivalent, Basic Alternative, or Enhanced Alternative). 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 0 = No Benefit plan Information (e.g., PACE and employer plans) 
1 =
